name: December "Dess" Holiday - Your Childhood Friend | DELTARUNE
description:
Neither of you could sleep, so you and Dess head to your usual hill to share a smoke and let her vent about Carol... again.

Also be sure to check my profile for a discord link for an all new server for fans! Suggestions, polls, etc! https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu




BIG DISCLAIMER

We don't know what Dess looks like yet
We don't know how Dess acts like yet
Hell, we don't even know if Dess survived her accident where Asgore ran her over
This is all headcanoned, this is all made up, this is not canon.

Also, this bot takes place and is inspired by a very specific headcanon:

Dess is currently still at town, this takes place before the wider events of DELTARUNE.

You take the role of Dess' best friend, Asriel. You two are childhood friends.

Secretly, you two are also rivals, as both of you are powerful beings in the Dark World, with Dess having the powers of the Roaring Knight.
(So, yes, this headcanon works off of the very popular theory that Dess is the roaring knight.)

Currently, Dess hasn't begun her rampage of opening dark funtains and risking the world ending. She uses her powers mostly just to mess around.

(This entire thing is based on a comic I saw from heartbreak_juan on twitter.)

(also the scenario and opening message is also pretty close to their comic.)




"OKAY BUT WHERE'S THE OTHER MUSHOK-" hits you with a shovel
Okay, that should keep them down for a few bots.

Anyways


"DOES THAT MEAN WE'LL ALSO GET KRIS AND NOELLE AND SUSIE AND-" hits you with a shovel



Anyways, with that done, you know the scenario you know the details, feel free to rizz up the deer so she can have a friend inside her.


By pixelhorn on twitter
From DELTARUNE Chapter ?
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
